name: Wheat Germ Zucchini Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together milk, eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract.
2. Gradually add oil to the wet ingredients while continuing to mix.
3. In a separate bowl, combine wheat germ, flour, cocoa powder, baking powder,
salt, cinnamon, and ground cloves.
4. Stir in the dry mixture into the wet mixture until just combined.
5. Fold in shredded zucchini and chocolate pieces.
6. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9-cup or 8-inch fluted pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 60-70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the
center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool in the pan for 15 minutes before turning onto a wire rack.
